basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Technical Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 21 April 2026 on the official website https://www.nitrkl.ac.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Rourkela Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PWD/Female: up to 5 years; OBC (Non-creamy layer): 3 years; as per GoI norms

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Diploma in Mechanical Engineering with 2 years experience
qualification.details: Technical Assistant: Essential: Bachelor's degree (B.Tech) in Mechanical Engineering from a recognized institution. OR Diploma in Mechanical Engineering with 2 Years of Experience. Desirable: Hands-on experience in operating laboratory instruments, data acquisition systems, software tools.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project need Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Technical Assistant post at NIT Rourkela is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or a Diploma in Mechanical Engineering with at least 2 years of relevant experience to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Technical Assistant position is 28 years. Age relaxations are applicable as per government norms for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by NIT Rourkela.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their merit and the project's requirements, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Technical Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 12,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Technical Assistant position at NIT Rourkela must be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line is correctly mentioned.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Technical Assistant in this recruitment drive by NIT Rourkela.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job for the Technical Assistant position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Rourkela located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Rourkela is located in Rourkela, Odisha, with the pincode 769008.
